[File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/contractController.js -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getContractStateById()] Can an unprivileged user call `/contracts/:contractId/state` with `timestamp=lte:X` to read the contract state as it existed at any historical point, exposing storage values that were set by authorized signers in past transactions without any time-based access restriction?
